reviews.review_description:
This is an amazing way of learning some dance skills and it’s really fun to do it!
I’ve been playing for like a week now and just bought the bachata bronze so improve myself even more!

I do have a suggestion to make it even more fun; for example, bachata has several dance songs, and I would like the idea that I can choose my own bachata song to practice on it!

I can’t wait for more bachata and more salsa lessons! So I hope to see salsa-bronze next!

reviews.review_title: Game, exercise, learn a skill. Awesome.
reviews.review_description: The creator David Huang is a great guy (go to the discord) and clearly put what he wanted in VR, into real life. Dude literally MADE the change he wanted to see in the world. It works impressively well, my 70 year old mom even got a Quest 3 because of this game.  David is always trying to improve the game, adding new dances etc. Absolutely worth the price.

reviews.review_title: Rediscovered the old me in this app!
reviews.review_description: Tried this for the first time today. I used to ballroom dance as a child and this transported me back to a graceful peaceful time! In just one lesson I was dancing round the room with my virtual partner. Takes a bit of practice to link hands but once there it’s not far from the real thing! Amazing ❤️

developer_response.body: Great! That’s what we love to hear!

reviews.review_description:
Really good
silver upgrade plz!!

reviews.review_title: I didn't know i needed it!!
reviews.review_description: It's so accurate!! This will save me tons of money in dance clases and will go straight to the social 😁

developer_response.body: That’s what we love to hear!  Did you take Bachata bronze!  We hope to get to even more advanced courses soon, so you have even more moves to show off at your social!

reviews.review_description:
I tried out the Waltz lessons as a beginner and love it so far! They are well thought-out and well implemented. Excited for more Waltz lessons to come out on DLCs. 

I like how they have the step maps both on the floor and at eye-level at the same time so you can look at your virtual partner while knowing where to go next. 

Also like that you can slow it down to learn the steps at your own pace. The tracking of the feet is cool too! I like this gamification the way it is!

Also, I got a bit dizzy with all the spinning in the Waltzes and I saw some advice to look at something stationary in the distance to help with that(?). Maybe there can be a short lesson or tip section about that. 

Otherwise, this is an amazing app that I'm happy to support! I think it’s a wonderful tool for people who are disabled or immunocompromised or  maybe socially anxious, who may not easily be able to just “get out there” and take lessons/dance with other people for whatever reasons.

PS I would love swing dance lessons please!

Edit: I’m happy to see they added a convenient option to adjust the play area within the game, reachable on your wrist. It works well in the game, to move and rotate the step maps to your liking!

I also tried out the other dance styles and it’s amazing how easy this app makes it to learn them! Never danced anything before. Looking forward to more!!!!

developer_response.body:
great to hear that the updated features are helping you! don't hesitate to leave us any additional feedback.
UPDATE: We just released the Bachata Bronze Course! Come check it out!

reviews.review_description: I had used the app for a little while and wondered why my partner referred to me as Mate. When I looked at the wardrobe I realised I must have indicated I was male, I'm not. Deleted then reinstalled the app but it bypassed the initial set up, so I'm still a fella. Please let me know how I can change my sex. Thanks

developer_response.body: Hi, you can change the leader or follower role by clicking on the wrist menu. There is a toggle that allows you to switch between leader and follower.  However, the wardrobe is actually meant for the virtual partner, since we don’t have a way for you to see yourself in-game yet.  We will be adding a feature in the future where you can change the sex of the virtual partner regardless of which dance role (leader or follower) you pick.

reviews.review_description: I planned on trying it out due to my brother's upcoming wedding, however I turned out to actually enjoy it. I haven't had the courage to go to an actual class since I have issues with looking incompetent, and this is a perfect alternative to build up the skills needed to do well in an actual class. And it's a surprisingly good workout lol.

reviews.review_title: Can't get past hand tracking setup
reviews.review_description:
The CONFIRM button from initial setup just keeps moving away lol can't reach it to enable hand tracking. Controllers are down and tracking enabled on quest 3. 

Will update rating after I'm in.

developer_response.body:
Hi, thank you for reporting the bug.  We've been trying to fix this bug.  It should have been fixe but it looks like there is still some edge cases.  

To make sure we understand what you're running into, it looks like before entering the app, you were using controllers.  After getting into the app, you're prompted with "If you are using controllers, please switch to hand tracking first".  After you put down the controllers, do you: 
1. see the transparent outline that appears and track your hands? 
2. Do you see the raycast line projecting from your hands?  

would be very helpful if you can let us know.  You can respond to our review here, or email us at help@hypercreative.tech

You've said that hand tracking is enabled on Quest 3 already, so if you've put down the controllers on a stable flat surface, after a couple seconds, hand tracking should automatically turn on and you should see raycast projecting from your hands.  So you should be able to click on the button with raycasting.  If that doesn't work, then we need to identify the problem causing that.

Another thing you can try, is to make sure hand tracking is already working beore opening Dance Guru.  If you are already using hand tracking before entering the app, you should see your hand being tracked with the transparent outline, and raycast projecting from your hands, which you can use to click on the menu buttons.
Thank you, and we appreciate your feedback!

reviews.review_title: Would be perfect with just a few tweaks
reviews.review_description:
Very fun and I was able to relearn a LOT of different moves. I love dancing and usually play Supernatural as it allows me to dance however I like because there is no real way to "fail" when exercising.
I would love to see that in this dancing game! I kept getting F scores and constantly being told that I missed. I would love if there was an option to just dance with your dance partner so I could exercise for long amounts of time without worrying about getting it "right". I would also love the option to customize the height of my dance partner to a more reasonable height as the male instructor towers over me. So far, though, it's an Amazing free game!

developer_response.body:
Hi thank you for the feedback!
We have just pushed an update (0.6.26) today which allows you to adjust the height of the partner.  Please give that a try and let us know what you think!
We will eventually be adding a "Free Dance" mode which doesn't keep scores and allos maximum flexibity for the user.  Please stay tuned for that, probably sometime during Q2 of this year.   Thank you!

reviews.review_description:
I was SO EXCITED when I saw this game. It's exactly the kind of game I own a VR headset for. But something is off on the calibration. From the tutorial all the way through the lessons of the Waltz that I attempted, the foot placement never registered like it should. Even when I looked down at the shoes and stepped on them when they lit up, and I was exactly on time with the instructor's counts, they always registered as misses and I continually got Fs. It's extremely difficult to place your foot in the EXACT tiny spot to get inside the circle. It would make the game much more fun if there was an option to make it not quite so precise. 

Also dancing with the partner was not calibrated correctly either. When I stood in front of him where the feet placement was inside the red circle, I was half a body to the left of him. His right arm was going through the middle of my body, when it should have been on my shoulder, and I couldn't reach his left hand with my right hand, because our bodies were so misaligned, and there was no way to calibrate it. So, in order to stay within the red circle, I kept "bumping" into him as we danced, and it was just a disaster with all F scoring.  

I had such high hopes for this game. I hope it continues to improve to make it actually playable. If it does, I would definitely pay for it! Even with all of the problems, I played until my battery went dead, charged it for a few hours and played until the battery died again. It has so much potential. Please keep making it better!

developer_response.body:
Hi, thank you and appreciate your detailed feedback.  We're sorry it must have been frustating for you.  Can you please email us at help@hypercreative.tech so we can troubleshoot for you?
Meanwhile, let us try to troubleshoot here as well.
First I would like to double check if you are using leader or follower?  It sounds like you're using Follower.   From your description, the partner may be too tall for you, so you cannot reach his left hand.  If so, we have just pushed a new update today, which allows you to adjust the height of the partner.
In most partner stances, it's normal to have the two partners stand slightly offset, to the right of each other.  But if the partner's arm is going through the middle of your body, then that's definetely off.  Please check that in the GPS //HUD, the red solid dot (which represents your head's position) is aligned inside the red circle.  When you move in a manner that matches the red solid dot inside the red circle, you should automatically be within the correct position through out the dance.
Hopefully these tips help. If not, please do not hesitate to email us.  If you have a video of your gameplay, it will also help us trouble shoot.  Thank you so much and we hope to hear from you soon!

reviews.review_description:
I have only used this app twice and am already learning to dance the Waltz. I really like the way it teaches, the hand tracking seems really good and I think it is great to not have to use the controllers as it feels more like dancing and less like gaming. Thanks for developing this an keep up the great work!

2 weeks on and I am still using this app. I have found that I get better scores when I dance with the dance teacher as it is easier to hit the right place on the dance floor. I like the fact that you can move on even if you do t score all that well in the try it out on your own section. I still rate this app at 5 Stars!

reviews.review_title: Fun, but harder for shorter people
reviews.review_description: I used to dance years ago and this brought back all the fun of ballroom dancing.  They really worked out how to explain a lot of the details, including weight shift.  My only complaint, but it's a big one for me, is that the foot placements are too far apart.  My legs are short and I can't keep up.  The eye-level display keeps reminding me that I'm messing up my foot placement.  That is very annoying.  In the real world, dancers adjust to the capabilities of both dancers.  Other apps (ex. Supernatural) measure me and make adjustments.  If Dance Guru could have some way (automatic or manual) to adjust the stride, they would have a winner here.

developer_response.body:
Hello! we have just pushed a new update (v.0.6.26) which allows players to adjust the height of the partner, which also changes the step sizes.  Please download the update and let us know what you think of it!
Email us at help@hypercreative.tech or
Feel free to join our Discord to follow the news: https://dsc.gg/danceguru

reviews.review_description: Can't wait for more lessons and routines! So sad I missed the Christmas outfits! They're super cute, wish the developers could have some more cool outfits made, it really adds to the game!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! we have just updated the Bachata Bronze Courses! Come Check it out! Also we pushed out a lot of new outfits too, let us know which ones are your favorite!!

reviews.review_description:
I love the concept and overall quality of instruction. The app is unique in featuring a HUD for eye-on-partner motion-guidance. The verbal + graphical language is simple and intuitive (feet placement, routine flow). There are two kinds of practice, working on a single step (eg. basic step in salsa) and, my favorite, sequence of steps for practicing transitions. I'm a big fan of single player dance apps like Dance Central / Dance Eden and already feel the benefit of being more deliberate in footwork.
I'm not quite happy with the scoring system (so 4 stars for now). Since the quality of instruction is already quite high, I feel like the compulsory scoring rather detracts by rewarding/reinforcing somewhat 'crimpled' range of motion. Because only the head is being tracked it's not sufficiently sensitive, once I look at my feet (instead of the HUD) it tend to interpret every step as 'miss'. Also, sometimes, I find myself 'driving with my head' to score a 'hit' which is kind of weird...  From a technically naive perspective coupling hand tracking for UI + partner interaction, with controllers for tracking feet seems like a good idea.
Anyways, I find combination of instruction quality + HUD so compelling so I'd proceed without scoring. Add some 'chance' in transitions between the steps in a routine and I'd spent hours practicing... Thanks for making this!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback! When we first started prototyping dance Guru, we actually strapped controllers onto the feet and it gave us feet tracking. But it was quite a hassle asking users to strap controllers to their feet, so we decided not to pursue that in the end.  We may still put in an option for controller feet tracking if we find enough interest in having this feature.
Scoring is indeed tricky when only limited to head tracking. We are hoping some third party full body tracking would become available soon, and make our scoring system more wholesome.

reviews.review_description: This app is truly one of the best experiences in the VR word. The app made a very positive impression on me from the start. The dance steps are very precise and easy to follow and the avatar teacher is awesome and polite.  I m looking forward to the next lesson and I hope more levels will be available soon.

Very good educational app. You learn real world dance moves in a gamified way. 
Good tracking, good explanation and nice reward system. 
Overall the game is really impressive, content wise and how it use hand tracking and mixed reality.

developer_response.body:
Thank you! Stay tuned for more contents in the coming year!
To stay updated with our latest news, please email us at help@hypercreative.tech , or join our discord: https://dsc.gg/danceguru

reviews.review_title: Great Learning app and nice work out!
reviews.review_description: As a Beta tester, I enjoyed this game during the dev cycle and even now with the early access build. IT makes learning dance easy even for an old guy with a Dad Bod!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your support through out our beta tests! Your feedback had been really helpful during our development!

reviews.review_description:
I love the tutorials and the fact that you have the steps on the floor!
I'm excited to get to the bronze, etc., levels.

developer_response.body: Bachata Bronze Courses just dropped in our latest update! Please check it out and give us your feedfback!

reviews.review_description:
Cant wait to show my new moves to a girl chachacha :D.
Looking forward to see new content and updates.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review! We have just pushed an update which includes the New Bachata Bronze courses!  Please check it out and let us know how you like it!

reviews.review_description: I played this game thinking it was going to be slop, but the more I played it, the more I saw its potential. The game is free, but feels paid. I liked the lessons the game has to offer and I would recommend getting this and the DLCs that will release in the future.

developer_response.body:
Thank you and please stay tuned for our new lessons in the coming months!
UPDATE: we just released the Bachata Bronze course, come give that a try!

reviews.review_description: Was able to learn or relearn some steps I hadn’t done in years, in a safe stress free environment.  Enjoyed being a part of the beta and glad to see this now launching.

developer_response.body: thank you for your continuous support throughout our early development phase!

reviews.review_description: I don't know what is the issue. it would not Work .i Just 😭😔download This

developer_response.body:
Hi, please let us know what issues are you having? Please email us at help@hypercreative.tech so we can help you.  

If you are getting stuck after the dance area perimeter setup, it looks like our design may be confusing and causing you to be stuck. After setup of dance area perimeter, there should be a set of footprints that appear on the floor, and once you step on them, it will proceed.  You may not have seen the footprints on the floor as they may be behind you after setting the area perimeter.  We are sorry about this confusion, and we will change this mechanism in our next update so that it’s more clear.

This app works with hand tracking, so please make sure it’s turned on in your quest settings.  Make sure to setup Roomscale for the boundary settings too.
Also internet connection is required. Please do not hesitate to contact us so we can assist you. Thank you.

reviews.review_description: Not sure if I’m not calibrated correctly but even when I nail the steps it’s not giving me credit and I get an F every time. I think it’s bugged

developer_response.body:
Hi, is this happening on all the dance styles or just a certain dance style? Our tracking is derived from the head movement, since there is no way to track the feet.  It basically tracks how you are moving relative to the partner’s position.  There are 3 types of scores: position, direction, and orientation; Which score did you find unusually low?  On the GPS, Keeping the red dot (which is your head position) aligned inside the red circle through out the dance should generally give you good score.  We are also checking whether you’re moving in the correct direction on the correct beat, and if your body is oriented the right way.

Please contact us so we can help you troubleshoot.   Email us at help@hypercreative.tech or join our discord: https://dsc.gg/danceguru

reviews.review_description:
I tried several Dancing Apps. This one was the best one, but the learning content does not fill a full song. 
Just with this learning you won't be able to dance a full song without boring your dance couple in a loop of basic steps.
Paid Bachata content seems to be a bit better. I will add 5 stars once you have at least two more levels of Salsa.
Congratulations for the app.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback!  The free beginner lessons only teaches 3 dance figures (and 2 routines), and are really meant to just give users a taste of each dance style, so that they can decide which advance paid lessons they want to pursue.  Our paid Bachata Bronze course offer 11 dance figures and 9 routines, in addition to the 3 dance figures taught in beginner lessons, those 15 dance figures will give enough building blocks to choreograph something fun for the dance floor!  Bronze Salsa course are in development now and will be added later in a few months.
We have thought about adding more lesson to the beginner course, but we may not be able to offer the entire beginner course for free any more if we do that.  It's something we are assessing now, but we really appreciate your feedback!

reviews.review_description: First time could get out of controlls to hand and couldnt get of the game im stuck in it dont know how to get out
I CANT WAIT FOR MORE! GIVE ME MORE! ;-)

developer_response.body: We just added Bachata Bronze Course!  Come give it a try!

reviews.review_description: very cool i've been waiting for this to come out but it needs controllers

developer_response.body:
We will be adding additional features through out the Early Access and controllers is on our to-do list. Once we have that, we invite you to come back and give us another try and revise your review.
To stay updated with our latest news, please email us at help@hypercreative.tech , or join our discord: https://dsc.gg/danceguru

reviews.review_description: I picked follower and need leader. I uninstalled and reinstalled and it takes me back to follower. How do I reset this?

developer_response.body: Hi, you can choose leader or follower on your wrist menu.  Look at your left hand wrist, and click it with your finger.  There is a toggle that allows you to switch between the 2 roles.  Thanks for the review!

reviews.review_description: I was considering purchasing another PS2 to utilize my existing DDR dance pad for footwork practice. While exploring new options, I serendipitously discovered Dance Guru. Upon charging my Quest 2, I engaged with the application. I am uncertain whether to categorize it as a game, a dance simulator, or a trainer. Regardless of its classification, it is truly exceptional. I spent approximately three hours using it last night and have already acquired new skills. The software proficiently introduces users to novel dance routines within the comfort of their own homes. Im looking forward to practicing dance everyday , I feel that it will elevate my current skill and introduce me to  new skills.

developer_response.body:
UPDATE: we just released the Bachata Bronze Course! Give that a try!

Thank you!  We are so excited to see our users enjoying and learning new skills from Dance Guru.  With our new advanced courses coming out in the next few months, there will be plenty for you to keep coming back for!

To stay updated with our latest news, please email us at help@hypercreative.tech , or join our discord: https://dsc.gg/danceguru

reviews.review_description:
It is so much fun and easy way to learn.
Unfortunately I tried to switch from the male teacher to a female one. Deleting storage or reinstall didn't work

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for the review! Click on the wrist menu on your left hand, there is a button to switch between leader and follower, give that a try!

reviews.review_description:
I tried the beginners steps and even compete and I love it, the only reason I stopped
Is because my Meta quest was running out of batteries …

developer_response.body: Charge your battery and give our new Bachata Bronze Course a try!  We just released it today!
